external_references.description: Idan Dardikman. (2025, October 18). GlassWorm: First Self-Propagating Worm Using Invisible Code Hits OpenVSX Marketplace. Retrieved April 10, 2026.
Ilyas Makari. (2025, October 31). The Return of the Invisible Threat: Hidden PUA Unicode Hits GitHub repositorties. Retrieved April 10, 2026.
Kirill Boychenko. (2026, January 31). GlassWorm Loader Hits Open VSX via Developer Account Compromise. Retrieved April 10, 2026.

objects.description: [GlassWorm](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9010) has spread through Visual Studio extensions.(Citation: Koi Glassworm InvisibleCode October 2025)(Citation: Aikido GlassWorm October 2025)(Citation: Socket GlassWorm January 2026)  [GlassWorm](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9010) has also spread through JavaScript projects hosted on Github.(Citation: Aikido GlassWorm October 2025)
